name: Bank First Corp
summary: Bank First Corporation is a Wisconsin-based bank holding company operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Bank First, N.A., a national banking association. The company provides commercial banking services including commercial and industrial loans, owner-occupied commercial real estate loans, residential real estate lending, and wealth management services. It operates primarily in Wisconsin and the Stateline region of Illinois, serving businesses, real estate developers, and individual customers.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial Loans
products.description: Lending products targeted at business banking clients with proven track records.

products.name: Owner-Occupied Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Real estate financing for owner-occupied commercial properties.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: Mortgage and residential lending products for individual customers.

products.name: Wealth Management
products.description: Fee-based wealth management services generating fee income for the company.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Consumer and commercial deposit products including checking and savings accounts.
